Yes hex vr is really good has people playing it but its not as good as echo vr i just hasn’t filled the gap that echo did and it might never because i spent hours grinding the I couldn’t wait to play every single day,cause it was fun and that day it shut down i was devastated to find it shut down forever and now i want the good days back even if it was for a day so i want echo vr back

reviews.review_title: Love it it’s kind of like the OG echo VR
reviews.review_description: It’s OK, but it just doesn’t have that many people online so I would probably recommend making like a video about it cause I’d it’d probably get popular and it actually is just like Echo VR It has the same movement same everything. I would definitely recommend this if you are an echo player. But yeah, I would rate this. Probably an eight out of 10 not a bad game actually decent I actually kinda like it. But I’ma say is it just needs some updates
i used to play

I never was able to echo vr but someone told me this is a good recreation of it so I got it and played it for a bit but the sever are died no one is playing and I wish I could actually play with someone but there is no one on 

Loved the game no one is playing

I’m an old Echo VR player. Had a whole lot of hours in the game. This game has the potential to be huge in completely filling the gap Echo left. Played about an hour of Hex, it’s great and feels as close as anything could be in the state it’s in. Looking forward to all future updates and will love when you can make your character feel a little more you. Hope it’s not to long now till launch!
Its very fun and good for a beta
cant even close the menu

Hex Vr is a great game if you loved playing Echo Vr, the mechanics aren’t the same and the game still needs a lot of work, however this game has great potential. But the servers are always empty, it isn’t fun if you don’t have other people playing.

This game is pretty fun. I personally think it has potential to replace Echo. There’s just one problem, there’s no one playing this game. Even a year ago, there was only like 5 or 6 people ever online. If we can get this game into a mass revival, then this becomes even 4 or 5 stars.

reviews.review_title: Empty Game with no updates in a year
reviews.review_description: Has huge potential as a concept to replace echo and to stand on its own but no one is ever on and half the game doesnt work right. It needs an open spawn in point which puts you already online and interacting with other players, more game modes, more customizations, etc.

developer_response.body:
Hi Atmatan! Thanks for the feedback
You should check out the community discord server :) We've been working on an update this whole time

reviews.review_description: I’m just hoping that in the next update (that I’m assuming is huge because of how long it’s taking) will be just like echo with an actual game mode not just a score counter.

The only problem is that there is no people on it . I hoped on and there were 2 people on the whole game.... 
 And there is no skins or punching . The real echo u were able to punch them to stun them now u can only take the Frisbee off people . 
Amazing game but try make it a tad bit better for people to come on

developer_response.body:
Hi Zacward! Thank you for the feedback!
Player counts are likely low due to there being no updates recently. While we don't plan on adding any kind of punching system, we are working on a major content update for the game :) It is important to keep in mind that although it was entertaining in echo to punch people, we're not Echo and plan on doing our own thing.

I am so happy that my favorite game on VR is back! The only game I played in the VR was Echo VR and when it got deleted I didn’t turn my oculus on again.

developer_response.body:
While we aren't Echo VR, we are heavily inspired by the game and community they built :) They were a genre defining title, and we're hoping to walk in their footsteps 

Please feel free to join the Community Server for game update announcements

reviews.review_description: Your crowning can be complete. Emerge... Emerge!!

reviews.review_title: Gone in the game yet? No. Love it? Yes.
reviews.review_description: I don’t even have to go in the game yet, and this is my top 3 favorite game. The time you put into the game devs just to bring back echo is the nicest thing i’ve seen a human do. You guys truly are one of my favorite human beings. God bless you.
Nobody is online can someone please help😕

developer_response.body:
Hello! there are often people online, however the server browser tends to occasionally bug out, if you encounter the bug, there is a simple fix:
 to make the servers appear is create your own room, and then leave it. This should refresh the feed and you will see servers

reviews.review_description:
Ever since Echo VR Shut down on August 1st of last year I’ve been looking for a remake, something that wouldn’t have to shut down servers as a goodbye but I have some ideas for the devs.

1.     Add a main lobby where you can socialize with others and have different toys


2.     Add Different Skins Like a Pirate, Astronaut,  Dragon etc.


3.       Add a Currency that can be earned by: Playing Games, Scoring, Or buying it with USD (or whatever your Currency Is)


4.        Add a Map where it’s like Boxing with a knockout system like Echo VR


5.        Add a Map where it’s like a lounge that has a working Seating System


6.        Add a VR headset that you can equip if you reviewed the game

7.         Add an accessory System That you can Buy, Earn by leveling up, or just distributes random item based on your stats you played in that game

8.        Add a Stat system so Different players can learn what they need to fix for the next match that they play in

9.         Add different Bundles that have different items like a Skin, Back Item, and A banner designed for that character

10.      The Final one,  Add Different colors for banners and skin so they could Players if they want could have a blue or green dragon etc.


That’s it Thank you for this awesome Game! 👍🏻👍🏻
Needs a little work like the disk grabbing and maybe adding a lobby it is an awesome game. It just came out so can’t expect to much from it.

developer_response.body: Hey Snipe! Glad you're planning on sticking around to see the game grow :)

reviews.review_description: LETS GO BOYS WE DID IT ECHO ARENA HAS MADE A RETURN

developer_response.body: We don't know about better, but it's flattering to be compared to giants in the genre! Thank you for the kind review Shmango <3

reviews.review_description: Awsome remake of Echo Vr it's 0 gravity disc Frisbee.

developer_response.body: We're glad you're enjoying the beta thus far! It's important to keep in mind though that we're not a remake of anything, we're just a game in the same genre. We've got our own ideas and plans that'll be expanded upon throughout the beta :)

reviews.review_title: Felt so good to throw a virtual disc.
reviews.review_description: Looking forward to seeing how this progresses. Booted it up and I almost died inside. The nostalgia is real boys. They have a strong base to make echo qgain

developer_response.body: Hey Nameless! We're glad you're enjoying the beta thus far! We're happy to reignite the genre
